symbols: flames — elemental energy, destruction, and transformation
description: An abstract composition dominated by violent sweeping forms in red, orange, yellow, white, and black. The shapes suggest roaring flames or an intense conflagration, with jagged tongues of fire rising and swirling across the entire canvas. The paint is applied in thick, agitated strokes and drips. Dark black and grey forms twist through the bright reds and whites. The overall effect is one of raw, primal energy and combustion. No recognizable figures or objects are discernible.
